title: Probe-Seq
author: Ryoji Amamoto
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.baeiibce
materials: Dissect retinas in HBSS at RT.
From the Recoverall RNA/DNA Isolation Kit (Thermo Fisher Scientific AM1975), mix 100 µL of Digestion Buffer and 4 µL of protease for each sample.

steps.title: Place retina in microcentrifuge tube and...
steps.instruction: Place retina in microcentrifuge tube and remove most of the HBSS.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of the pre-warmed Papain Mix
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of the pre-warmed Papain Mix.

steps.title: Incubate for 7 minutes at 37...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 7 minutes at 37 o C with no agitation.

steps.title: Spin 600xg for 2
steps.instruction: Spin 600xg for 2.5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of HBSS/FBS without agitation
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of HBSS/FBS without agitation.

steps.title: Spin 600xg for 2
steps.instruction: Spin 600xg for 2.5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 600 µL of DMEM/BSA
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 600 µL of DMEM/BSA.

steps.title: Dissociate by triturating the tissue with a P1000 pipette
steps.instruction: Dissociate by triturating the tissue with a P1000 pipette. ~15 times in/out pipetting should be sufficient to dissociate into single cells.

steps.title: Transfer homogenate to a 5 mL...
steps.instruction: Transfer homogenate to a 5 mL polypropylene tube (Thermo Fisher Scientific cat. #14-959-11A). Make sure to seal the cap by pushing in.

steps.title: Spin 600xg for 5 minutes at 4 o C
steps.instruction: Spin 600xg for 5 minutes at 4 o C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of 4% PFA
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of 4% PFA. Resuspend. Incubate for 15 minutes at 4 o C with rocking.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at 4 o C
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at 4 o C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of Permeabilization Buffer
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of Permeabilization Buffer. Resuspend. Incubate for 10 minutes at 4 o C with rocking.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at 4 o C
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at 4 o C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 500 µL of 40% wHyb
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 500 µL of 40% wHyb. Resuspend. Incubate for at least 30 minutes at 43 o C in the oven.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 100 µL of pre-warmed (43 o C) Probe Mix. Resuspend. Incubate for at least 16 hours at 43 o C in the oven.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of pre-warmed (43...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of pre-warmed (43 o C) 40% wHyb, resuspend, and spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 500 µL of pre-warmed (43 o C) 40% wHyb. Resuspend. Incubate for 15 minutes at 43 o C.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 1 mL of pre-warmed (43 o C) 2x SSC. Resuspend. Incubate for 5 minutes at 43 o C.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant, Resuspend, and add 500...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant, Resuspend, and add 500 µL of pre-warmed (37 o C) PBS.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 100 µL of pre-warmed (37 o C) Fluorescent Oligo Mix. Resuspend. Incubate for 10 minutes at 37 o C.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of pre-warmed (37...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of pre-warmed (37 o C) PBS, resuspend, and spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 500 µL of pre-warmed (37 o C) PBS. Resuspend. Incubate for 5 minutes at 37 o C.

steps.title: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 2000xg for 5 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Resuspend in 500 – 1000 µL of PBS
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 500 – 1000 µL of PBS. Keep cells on ice.

steps.title: Filter and proceed to FACS
steps.instruction: Filter and proceed to FACS.

steps.title: Gate based on Hoechst histogram, as shown below
steps.instruction: Gate based on Hoechst histogram, as shown below. This step will ensure that you get 2N nuclei. Make sure not to include 4N nuclei. You can also gate based on FSC/SSC for cells vs. debris, but this step is likely unnecessary.

steps.title: Gate using a 2D plot with appropriate wavelengths
steps.instruction: Gate using a 2D plot with appropriate wavelengths. The negative population will likely run diagonal. The positive population will be left- or right-shifted compared to the diagonal events (i.e. the Vsx2 + cells below). Often, the separation will not be as obvious as GFP or well characterized cell surface markers. Thus, it’s a good idea to run a negative control (fluorescent oligo only control).

steps.title: FACS isolated cells are sorted into...
steps.instruction: FACS isolated cells are sorted into 1% BSA/PBS and kept at 4 o C.

steps.title: Spin at 3000xg for 7 minutes at 4 o C
steps.instruction: Spin at 3000xg for 7 minutes at 4 o C.

steps.title: Remove as much supernatant as possible
steps.instruction: Remove as much supernatant as possible. Usually, there is ~40-50 µL left.

steps.title: Incubate at 50 o C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 50 o C for 3 hours (wrap the lid with parafilm). Note that this step differs from the manufacturer’s protocol.

steps.title: The samples can be stored at...
steps.instruction: The samples can be stored at -80 o C indefinitely after incubation or proceed to next steps according to the kit protocol.

steps.title: Prep Isolation Additive/Ethanol mix (for 100...
steps.instruction: Prep Isolation Additive/Ethanol mix (for 100 µL digest, 120 µL isolation + 275 µL 100% Ethanol. Usually, there is ~140 µL so adjust accordingly).

steps.title: Add Isolation/Ethanol Mix and Pipet to mix
steps.instruction: Add Isolation/Ethanol Mix and Pipet to mix.

steps.title: Add onto filter and spin 10000xg...
steps.instruction: Add onto filter and spin 10000xg for 30 seconds at RT.

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through. Wash with 700 µL of Wash 1. Spin 10000xg for 30 seconds at RT.

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through. Wash with 500 µL of Wash 2. Spin 10000xg for 30 seconds at RT.

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through. Spin 10000xg for 30 seconds at RT.

steps.title: Prep DNase Mix (6 µL 10x...
steps.instruction: Prep DNase Mix (6 µL 10x DNase Buffer, 4 µL DNase, 50 µL UltraPure Water).

steps.title: Add 60 µL of DNase Mix to center of cartridge
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL of DNase Mix to center of cartridge. Close cap and incubate for 30 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Add 700 µL of Wash 1,...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL of Wash 1, incubate 1 minute at RT. Spin 10000xg for 30 seconds at RT.

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through. Wash twice with 500 µL of Wash 2.

steps.title: Spin 10000xg for 1 minute to remove residual fluid
steps.instruction: Spin 10000xg for 1 minute to remove residual fluid.

steps.title: Elute in ~17 µL of UltraPure...
steps.instruction: Elute in ~17 µL of UltraPure water (Use more water if lower concentration desired. Eluting with 17 µL will leave you with ~12 µL of RNA, which is enough for SMART-Seq v.4, Qubit, and/or BioAnalyzer).

steps.title: Store RNA at -80 o C
steps.instruction: Store RNA at -80 o C. ** Qubit or BioAnalyzer can be used to estimate RNA concentration. If less than 10,000 cells, concentration may not be available by these methods.

steps.title: Proceed to the SMART-Seq v
steps.instruction: Proceed to the SMART-Seq v.4 protocol for cDNA synthesis and amplification. Depending on the number of cells, you will use 9.5 µL of RNA for cDNA synthesis. Use 150 pg of cDNA for Nextera XT library kit.

steps.title: For a more detailed step-by-step guide...
steps.instruction: For a more detailed step-by-step guide for Probe-Seq, please download the PDF version of the protocol. It can be found under the Abstract tab.
